policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aks-03 - Ensure that authorization and authentication use the AzureAD'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Kubernetes+Service#IncidentremediationKubernetesService-drcp-aks-03 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP AKS Managed identity enabled
policyDefinition.description: Use managed identities to wrap around service principals, simplify cluster management and avoid the complexity required to managed service principals. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/aks-update-managed-identities.

drcp.name: AKSServicePrincipalProfile
drcp.controlDesc: Ensure that authorization and authentication use Microsoft Entra ID

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit or Disabled.
